sources.citation: Roger of Hoveden, Gesta Regis Ricardi (1189) — Eleanor's release and role at Richard's coronation

shots.speech_text: I am DAVID. Tonight, Eleanor of Aquitaine — duchess, queen of France, queen of England, and the woman who outlived two crowns.
